metadata.description: Home marketplace for goalify — the Claude Code skill that prepares self-contained, self-deleting goal files for a fresh session to execute with the built-in /goal.

plugins.name: goalify
plugins.description: goalify sets up a big coding task to run autonomously: scopes the work, locks the few real decisions, and writes a self-contained /goal file so a fresh session executes the whole job and verifies every success criterion before calling it done.
